headline: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Gets A Major Target Hike As SaaS Momentum Accelerates
summary: With a whopping upside potential of 35.19%, Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TYL) is among the 10 Tech Stocks That Could Make You a Millionaire. On May 1, Truist analyst Terry Tillman raised the firm’s price target on Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TYL) to $440 from $400 while maintaining a Buy rating. The company reported a strong start to 2026, […]
